lyric_text:
新年好呀，新年好呀，祝贺大家 新年好。
我们唱歌，我们跳舞，祝贺大家 新年好。HappyNew Year 
Happy New Year 
Happy New Year To You All 
We Are Singing 
We Are Dancing
Happy New Year To You All
